name: dotlight-marketplace
description: Marketplace for DotLightSkillset — a lightweight curated Claude Code skillset for .NET developers

plugins.name: dotlight-skillset
plugins.description: A lightweight curated Claude Code skillset for .NET developers — 0.9.0 rewires test-driven-development into the deterministic dispatch surface: Direct track gates on 'touches executable code' (test-first, bugs via systematic-debugging), executing-plans carries TDD as REQUIRED sub-skill per task, cross-references renamed to the real dotlight-skillset: namespace, and an orchestration rule keeps the track invariant under Workflow/ultracode/subagent execution. On 0.8.2: SessionStart hook fixed on Windows (exec-form cat → shell form) + triage ideation repair. On 0.8.0: 18 passive .NET descriptions rewritten trigger-first. On 0.7.0: nhibernate-patterns. On 0.6.x: SessionStart hook, wired review chain, upstream sync, lazy-senior-dev, database-design-conventions + database-review.
